memory-saver.description: Saves session context to ChromaDB memory

save.template:
Save the current session to ChromaDB memory.

Run: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py session list 3

Then: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py save "SESSION SUMMARY

## Decisions
- (list 3-7 key decisions)

## Files
- (list 3-7 files modified)

## Commands
- (list 3-5 important commands)" auto session_end "session-end" "shokunin"
save.description: Save current session to ChromaDB memory

load.template:
Load full memory context from ChromaDB and .memory-context.md.

1. First read E:\.opencode\..memory-context.md for the project summary
2. Then run: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py recent 3
3. Then run: python C:\Users\Admin\.shokunin\scripts\chroma-helper.py recall "Infocus architecture decisions features"
4. Summarize everything so the user knows context is restored
load.description: Load full memory context from ChromaDB + .memory-context.md
